name: the installer prompts for refresh frequency and explains why the sources matter
command: grep -q 'Refresh frequency' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/install.sh" && grep -q 'DERIVED FROM' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/install.sh" && grep -q 'RE-SCRAPES' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/install.sh" && echo explains-and-prompts 1>&2
